issues.description: Trigger is incorrect. Blocker activates when opponent declares an attack, not on a generic Trigger. Should be OnAttack.

Action is completely wrong. PlaySelf does not represent Blocker functionality. Blocker should Rest the card and redirect the attack target. No standard action exists for attack redirection; this requires custom logic or clarification that Blocker is a keyword ability managed by the game engine, not a triggered effect.
Missing condition. Blocker is optional ('you may'), and only functions after opponent declares an attack. Condition structure is absent.
